title: afrormosia angolensis
intro: Afrormosia angolensis, also known as Okoume, is a tropical tree native to West Africa, belonging to the family Lauraceae. It has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Afrormosia angolensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of essential oils, extracts, and infusions, often used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
